channel.title: HTB Writeups Hub — rootea.es
channel.description: Últimas máquinas retiradas de Hack The Box añadidas al catálogo.

item.title: Sauna (Windows · Fácil)
item.description: Information Leakage Ldap Enumeration Kerberos User Enumeration - Kerbrute ASRepRoast Attack (GetNPUsers) Cracking Hashes System Enumeration - WinPEAS AutoLogon Credentials BloodHound - SharpHound.ps1 DCSync Attack - Secretsdump [Privilege E

item.title: Forest (Windows · Fácil)
item.description: AXFR - Domain Zone Transfer Attack (Failed) RPC Enumeration - Getting valid domain users Performing an AS-RepRoast attack with the obtained users Cracking Hashes Abusing WinRM - EvilWinRM Ldap Enumeration - ldapdomaindump BloodHound Enumera

item.title: Active (Windows · Fácil)
item.description: SMB Enumeration Abusing GPP Passwords Decrypting GPP Passwords - gpp-decrypt Kerberoasting Attack (GetUserSPNs.py) [Privilege Escalation]

item.title: Sense (Linux · Fácil)
item.description: Information Leakage PFsense - Abusing RRD Graphs (RCE) [Evasion Techniques] Python Exploit Development (AutoPwn) [EXTRA]

item.title: Shocker (Linux · Fácil)
item.description: ShellShock Attack (User-Agent) Abusing Sudoers Privilege (Perl) EXTRA: Creamos nuestro propio CTF en Docker que contemple ShellShock

item.title: Blue (Windows · Fácil)
item.description: SMB Enumeration Eternalblue Exploitation (MS17-010) [Triple Z Exploit] Obtaining credentials stored in memory [MIMIKATZ + Windows Defender Evasion] (EXTRA) Enabling RDP from CrackMapExec (EXTRA) Windows Persistence techniques (EXTRA) Window

item.title: Mirai (Linux · Fácil)
item.description: Pi-hole credenciales por defecto, USB forensics

item.title: Grandpa (Windows · Fácil)
item.description: Microsoft IIS 6.0 - WebDAV 'ScStoragePathFromUrl' Exploitation [RCE] Token Kidnapping - Churrasco [Privilege Escalation]

item.title: Granny (Windows · Fácil)
item.description: Abusing PUT & MOVE Methods - Uploading Aspx WebShell Microsoft IIS 6.0 - WebDAV 'ScStoragePathFromUrl' Exploitation [RCE] Token Kidnapping - Churrasco [Privilege Escalation]

item.title: Beep (Linux · Fácil)
item.description: Elastix 2.2.0 Exploitation - Local File Inclusion (LFI) Information Leakage Vtiger CRM Exploitation - Abusing File Upload (1st way) [RCE] Shellshock Attack (2nd way) [RCE]

item.title: Optimum (Windows · Fácil)
item.description: HttpFileServer 2.3 Exploitation [RCE] System Recognition - Windows Exploit Suggester Microsoft Windows 8.1 (x64) - 'RGNOBJ' Integer Overflow (MS16-098) [Privilege Escalation]

item.title: Devel (Windows · Fácil)
item.description: Abusing FTP + IIS Services Creating an AutoPwn Script [Python Scripting] Microsoft Windows (x86) – ‘afd.sys’ (MS11-046) [Privilege Escalation]

item.title: Legacy (Windows · Fácil)
item.description: SMB Enumeration Eternalblue Exploitation (MS17-010) [Triple Z Exploit]
